cards.name: Whirlpool Bay
cards.rulesText:

Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Thalwind draw it. Otherwise bury it.
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Volcanic Wastes
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Hoard 5: Gain an additional action. (You have hoard 5 if you control 5 or more stones.)
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: War'rinoco, Nature's Firstborn
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Put a growth counter on up to 3 target lands. They are legendary Wonders with power equal to the number of lands you control. They're still lands.

cards.name: Thundercrash Axe
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +2. The first time this is equipped each round, gain a <Badge variant="orange">free attack</Badge> in this realm.

cards.name: Vulcan Vale
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Solfera land, you may untap this.
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Dreamweaver Sloth
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: Time is a fruit. Memories are the roots. Dreams are the wind. And enemies are the bugs.

cards.name: Tik Nollegee
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Destroy target item with cost 3 or less.
cards.flavorText: Like his machines, Tik's mind has a few pieces missing.

cards.name: Trinity Barboni
cards.rulesText: While equipped, this gets +3.
cards.flavorText: The outlaws of Heliosynth follow the cult of weaponry.

cards.name: Wavecleaver Sword
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +1 and "<Badge variant="blue">ON BATTLE</Badge> you may draw a card."
cards.flavorText: "They say it can split the sea. Heh, idiots." - Morok the Foolish

cards.name: Wretched Mirror of Requiem
cards.rulesText: The next time an enemy Wonder arrives in any realm, its owner sacrifices it. If they do, sacrifice this.

cards.name: Zenik Azimuth
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Ascend</Badge> (<Badge variant="blue">On Round 7</Badge>) this gets +2 for each enemy Wonder in this realm.
cards.flavorText: Astral mages sometimes spend weeks in a trance, unraveling the secrets of Formless Energy.

cards.name: Alister the Unbroken
cards.rulesText:
Hoard abilities you control require 1 less stone to become active.
On Arrival
Put a protector counter on target Wonder.

cards.name: Icarion, Ascension Arbiter
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Put a celestial counter on target Wonder. (Wonders with celestial counters get "Ascend, This gets +4.")
Ascend abilities trigger an additional time.

cards.name: Shaka Bok III, Well Favored
cards.rulesText: Whenever this wins a battle for the first time each round, return target Wonder you own from The Abyss to target realm.

cards.name: Zeltona, The Voice of The First
cards.rulesText:
Whenever another Priest, Cleric, or Fanatic arrives under your control, gain faith equal to its power.
Tap Free
You may spend faith any number of times this round.

cards.name: Wave Whisperer Bay
cards.rulesText:
On Play
You may look at the top card of your deck. You may put it back on top or bury it (Put it on the bottom of your deck.)
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Galewraith, Protector of the Skies
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Seek 2 a Thalwind Wonder.
Enemies in this realm lose flying.

cards.name: Valthok Bladebane
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Sacrifice a Wonder. If you do, put three +1 counters on this.
cards.flavorText: "When Nocturna shaped the first orcs, she thought of innocence. What corrupted them so?" - Groknar

cards.name: Vamparus Assassin
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="red">Deathstrike</Badge> (When this wins or ties a battle, destroy target enemy Wonder in this realm.)
cards.flavorText: Forever hunting, forever hungry.

cards.name: Thunderclap Flash
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="red">Stun</Badge> target Wonder (Tap it and reduce its power to 0 this round.)
cards.flavorText: BOOM!

cards.name: Wren Arbor
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Petraia draw it. Otherwise bury it.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Soul Jar Mastery
cards.rulesText: Destroy target Wonder in a realm where you control a stone.
cards.flavorText: Souls screamed as they swam, each an unwilling source of dark power.

cards.name: Patch Squibbler
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: "The world is broken. But I fix things." - Zarmi, Tribe Artificer

cards.name: Numinatrix Aurora Ignitara
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 2 faith.
Spend 2 faith: Put a shield counter on target Wonder. (Spend faith once per round as a free action.)

cards.name: Hex Hunter HX-11
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Attacking enemies get -1 this round.
cards.flavorText: Before the Grand Archive fell, its secrets were scattered. He's picking up the pieces.

cards.name: Lunar Empowerment
cards.rulesText:
Trigger the ascend abilities of up to two target Wonders with ascend. Those effects end this round.
Attuned Boundless (If you control a Boundless land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Skaldar Grimshade
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain a free attack.
Hoard 1: This gets +2. (You have hoard 1 if you control 1 or more stones.)
cards.flavorText: Sigrid smiled when she heard grandfather had returned.

cards.name: Koiscale
cards.rulesText:
On Defense
This gets +2 this round.
cards.flavorText: Its most treasured possession is its own reflection.

cards.name: Forgotten Draugr
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Hoard 1: Put two +1 counters on this. (You have hoard 1 if you control 1 or more stones.)
cards.flavorText: They fought for a war they could never win, in a battle that would never end.

cards.name: Oakthorn's Elysium
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Petraia land, you may untap this.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: The Light Forge
cards.rulesText:
If you control 3 or fewer stones, opponents can't attack in this realm unless they give you 1 energy or 1 action.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Synapse Ridge
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Heliosynth draw it. Otherwise bury it.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: TauMecha Outskirts
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Gain 2 faith.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Master Farid
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may untap target Wonder.
Attuned Petraia (If you control a Petraia land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Rav, Courtroom Mistress
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
This gets +2 this round, and target Wonder gets -2 this round.
cards.flavorText: "For a brief moment I tasted joy, only to realize it was my own insanity awakened."

cards.name: The Remains of Barnabus
cards.rulesText:
On Round End
You may return this from The Abyss to target realm.
cards.flavorText: Eternal life comes with eternal servitude.

cards.name: Glacium Keep
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Thalwind land, you may untap this.
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Static Shock
cards.rulesText: This round, whenever an enemy Wonder attacks it gets -2 until end of round.
cards.flavorText: "I hope this hurts."

cards.name: Scorpion's Edge
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets +2. At end of round, you may return this to your hand.
Attuned Heliosynth (If you control a Heliosynth land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Fortune Dealer
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Deny 3 (Put 3 cards from the top of your deck into The Abyss.)
cards.flavorText: At the Chiaroscuro Market one can buy and sell misfortunes.

cards.name: Zephyrus Skyarc
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
If target player has 10 or more energy, their energy becomes 5 and you gain 5 energy.

cards.name: Floki, Born in Fire
cards.rulesText:
If it's round 1, the first time you seize a stone, gain an action.
Hoard 1: This gets +2. (You have hoard 1 if you control 1 or more stones.)

cards.name: Glemmer Bandit
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Symbiosis</Badge> (<Badge variant="blue">On arrival</Badge>, copy the ability of target Wonder with equal power.)
cards.flavorText: In the dim light of the forest floor, shadows dance with silent footsteps.

cards.name: Glowcap Fungus
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
Target Wonder in this realm gets +5 this round. Tap target enemy in this realm.
cards.flavorText: Harvest those with a blue glow and separate the cap. Wait fourteen nights for best effect.

cards.name: Isaac Sparkpaw
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Put a protector counter on target Wonder. (When a stone would be seized in battle against a protector, remove a protector counter instead.)

cards.name: Mold Warrior
cards.rulesText: When this is put into The Abyss from anywhere, create a 1-power Fungorian token Wonder in target realm.

cards.name: Revolutionary Cannon
cards.rulesText: When equipped Wonder attacks, it gets +2 this round and you may destroy target Wonder with cost 2 or less in this realm.

cards.name: Moonfire Crystal Mouse
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
Draw 2 cards. Gain 2 energy.
cards.flavorText: "Fuel the engines, boys! Keep shoveling them in!" – Captain Bloodfeather

cards.name: Nesula Majoris
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Ascend</Badge>: This gets +4. (<Badge variant="blue">On Round 7</Badge> this gets +4 this round.)
cards.flavorText: The Lightbearers guide travelers from endless wandering in the Void.

cards.name: The Skyseeker Twins
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Seek 3 a spell with cost 2 or less. (Reveal 3 cards from the top of your deck. You may play a spell with cost 2 or less for free. Bury the rest.)

cards.name: Pinkspore Dreamcap
cards.rulesText:
On Defense
This gets +1 this round for each Plant you control.
You can have any number of Pinkspore Dreamcaps in your deck.

cards.name: Progo
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Draw a card.
cards.flavorText: "I do not seek revenge on my kind. I seek perfection."

cards.name: Quantum Quell
cards.rulesText:
For the rest of this round, Wonders and items can only be played in target realm.
Attuned Boundless (If you control a Boundless land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Shroom Walker
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +5 this round, then banish target card in The Abyss.
cards.flavorText: Do not fear the silence, for in silence grow the mighty.

cards.name: Sir Starbeak
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Cards cost your opponents +1 energy to play in this realm this round.
cards.flavorText: Starbeak's squadron is a perfect model of precise chaos.

cards.name: Strength Augmentation
cards.rulesText: Put four +1 counters on target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Some power comes from will, some from authority, and some from a darker energy.

cards.name: Techsol
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Put a shield counter on target Wonder. (You may remove a shield from a card to prevent its targeting or destruction.)

cards.name: Spellbroken Flame Golem
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: If what you seek is fire and ash, first look inward.

cards.name: Ranidae Hopmaster
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Seek 3 a Wonder with cost 2 or less. (Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Play a Wonder with cost 2 or less for free in this realm. Bury the rest.)

cards.name: Necropolis of the Damned
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Umbrathene draw it. Otherwise bury it. Eternal: Return this to target realm. (Eternal triggers when this enters The Abyss from a deck.)
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Fortress Orcscar
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Umbrathene land, you may untap this. Eternal: Return this to target realm. (Eternal triggers when this enters The Abyss from a deck.)
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Techno-Historian
cards.rulesText: Items cost you 1 less energy to play from your hand.
cards.flavorText: Lost knowledge is a precious commodity.

cards.name: Set Sail
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Portal</Badge> target Wonder to realm 1. (Banish it and return it to that realm.)
cards.flavorText: Adventure calls whether you're willing or not.

cards.name: Sylvari Oceanbreaker
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Portal another target Wonder with cost 3 or less in this realm to another target realm. (Banish it and return it to that realm.)

cards.name: Syrenia Coralheart
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Portal target non-Merfolk Wonder in this realm to this realm. (Banish it and return it to this realm.)

cards.name: Kairos Mistral
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Stun target Wonder in this realm. (Tap it and reduce its power to 0 this round.)
cards.flavorText: "Tell me, which hurts more? The lightning or the humiliation?"

cards.name: Scarlet Devourer
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Return a Wonder you control in this realm to its owner's hand.
cards.flavorText: The fisherman spent all day bringing in what he thought was a feast. The fish had similar thoughts.

cards.name: Lynx Pawsong
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Attuned</Badge> Petraia (If you control a Petraia land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: The Betrayer of Ironskin Clan
cards.rulesText: Whenever a player harvests, you may gain 1 energy.
cards.flavorText: Which do you value more, honor or wealth?

cards.name: Seer's Gaze
cards.rulesText: Draw a card for each untapped land you control.
cards.flavorText: The lands whisper secrets to those who learn to listen.

cards.name: Sir Reynard
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put a protector counter on this. (When a stone would be seized in battle against a protector, remove a protector counter instead.)

cards.name: Harmonius Chordsinger
cards.rulesText:
Other Wonders you control in this realm get +1.
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Flamekissed Isle
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Solfera draw it. Otherwise bury it.
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Enraged Bear
cards.rulesText:
On Defense
This gets +3 this round.
cards.flavorText: Do not, I repeat, DO NOT poke the bear.

cards.name: Circuitious Q-7
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 2 faith.
Spend 5 faith: Stun target Wonder in this realm. (Spend faith once per round as a free action.)

cards.name: The Windreaver
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Gain control of target enemy Wonder this round. Untap it.
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Bio-Circuit Plant
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Heliosynth land, you may untap this.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Cosmo Cloudman
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Return a spell you own from The Abyss to your hand.
cards.flavorText: "When all possibilities exist, simply reach out and grab one."

cards.name: Valkeria Velorum
cards.rulesText:
Ascend: This gets +6. (On Round 7 this gets +6 that round.)
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Vobb Stalker
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Symbiosis</Badge> (<Badge variant="blue">On arrival</Badge>, copy the ability of target Wonder with equal power.)
cards.flavorText: You'll only hear it when it speaks with your own voice.

cards.name: Celestium Heights
cards.rulesText:
When you play a third Boundless land, you may untap this.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Solaris Stormcaster
cards.rulesText:
When equipped Wonder attacks, target enemy Wonder in this realm gets -X this round where X is equipped Wonder's power.
Attuned Heliosynth (If you control a Heliosynth land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Viking Sage of the Forge
cards.rulesText: Whenever a stone is seized from you in this realm, this gets +4 this round and you gain a <Badge variant="orange">free attack</Badge>.

cards.name: Cybernetic Enhancement
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets +3 and is a Bio-Synth in addition to its other classes.
Attuned Heliosynth (If you control a Heliosynth land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Sequestering Presence
cards.rulesText:
On Defense
Each attacking enemy Wonder in this realm gets -2 this round.
cards.flavorText: Biologicals have a critical weakness - their emotions.

cards.name: Sister Azura Silversong
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 3 faith.
Tap Free
Spend X faith: Gain X energy.
cards.flavorText: "Sing with me."

cards.name: Sirocco Blast
cards.rulesText: Destroy target Wonder that attacked this round.

cards.name: Sunfire City
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Gain control of all cards you own.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Cast Out
cards.rulesText:
Look at the top 2 cards of target player's deck. Banish any number of them and put the rest back in any order. Draw a card.
Attuned Boundless (If you control a Boundless land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Sir Caerban Ileander
cards.rulesText: Opponents can't play items or lands from their hands to this realm.
cards.flavorText: A trickster disguised as a trickster.

cards.name: Dealmaker Paladius
cards.rulesText: You can't play this from your hand to a realm unless an opponent controls a stone there.
cards.flavorText: Those searching the shadows will find demons willing to make deals.

cards.name: Eron Sharpeye
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put two +1 counters on target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Through the chaos, his arrows find their mark, bringing order to the wild.

cards.name: Skyjelly
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: Some believe they carry artifacts from The Great Forming. Others see them for what they are.

cards.name: Starburst Mallet
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +2. While this is equipped, enemies in this realm are <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>. (Their ability text is blank.)

cards.name: Starhorn Capra
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Remove all counters from target player's cards in target realm.
cards.flavorText: Few can withstand such a cosmic bleat.

cards.name: Syl Scalewhisper
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Create a 2-power Dragon token Wonder in each realm where you control a Dragon.
This gets +1 for each stone you control.

cards.name: Tech Nomad Nix
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Return target item you own from The Abyss to your hand.
cards.flavorText: His skills can restart a cold Life Engine Heart.

cards.name: Verdant Mace
cards.rulesText: Whenever a land you control arrives, put two +1 counters on equipped Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Whispers of a dark history echo from its ancient metal.

cards.name: Xeno Tagion
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Spend X energy. If you do, create a 1-power Experiment B-2101 token Wonder in target realm and put +X counters on it.

cards.name: Aethereal Enigmyst
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: "Our survival is essential to their existence. But how to explain this to creatures that can only see in 3 directions?" - Cygnatic Ventures

cards.name: Caroline Candole
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Create a 2-power Bella token Wonder in target realm.
cards.flavorText: Loyalty is a rare find in the world of politics.

cards.name: Catch
cards.rulesText: You may move target item you own to target realm. You control that item.

cards.name: Comet Cleaver
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Opponents can't attack in this realm this round.
Equipped Wonder gets +1.
cards.flavorText: The effects of a dying star yield unexpected forces.

cards.name: Cryptreach Province
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Deny 2 (Put 2 cards from the top of your deck into The Abyss.)
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Darkiron Fish
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: The scales make for excellent tools and are worth their weight in precious gems, depending on the season.

cards.name: Deconstruct
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice a Wonder. If you do, draw 2 cards and put a <Badge variant="purple">null</Badge> counter on target Wonder. (Cards with <Badge variant="purple">null</Badge> counters have blank ability text.)

cards.name: Dustfall Deadhead
cards.rulesText: Whenever this becomes equipped, it gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: "Killing it wherever I go."

cards.name: Wartamed Manticore
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
If this previously attacked this round, put two +1 counters on it.
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Eclipse Enclave
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's Boundless draw it. Otherwise bury it.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Energy Extraction
cards.rulesText:
Destroy target item.
Hoard 3: This costs 3 less energy to play from your hand. (You have hoard 3 if you control 3 or more stones.)

cards.name: Flash, the Windwalker
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Action
Look at target player's hand.
When this moves or dies, draw a card then discard a card.

cards.name: Vaporblast Artillery
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +3. When equipped Wonder attacks, you may move target defending Wonder to an adjacent realm.

cards.name: Stratos Windrider
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Discard your hand. Then draw that many cards.
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Broken Eldritch Idol
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Each player discards a card.
Tap Free
Return target card you own from The Abyss to your hand.

cards.name: Thorwing Thunderbeak
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Stun target Wonder in this realm. (Tap it and reduce its power to 0 this round.)
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Emerald Clearing
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Target Wonder in this realm gets +2 this round.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Seafly Nests
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 3: Whenever a Wonder moves into or out of this realm, you may put a +1 counter on it.
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Endless Ram
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: The sounds of its horns scraping against the rock are only less chilling than the horrific clacking of its jaws.

cards.name: Chained Crow
cards.rulesText:
Deathstrike (When this wins or ties a battle, destroy target enemy Wonder in this realm.)
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Tony "Fortune Hunter" Thickfur
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may put a land from your hand into this realm without using an action.
Attuned Petraia (If you control a Petraia land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Thought Tempest
cards.rulesText: Draw 3 cards. Then put a card from your hand on top of your deck.
cards.flavorText: Brilliance isn't for the gentle mind, but for those who embrace the tempest.

cards.name: Stoic Temple Guardian
cards.rulesText: Opponents can't seize a stone in this realm unless they are attacking with 2 or more Wonders.

cards.name: Gravitational Grasp
cards.rulesText:
Tap target Wonder. Untap another target Wonder.
Attuned Boundless (If you control a Boundless land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Professor Dro Stardust
cards.rulesText: If you have unspent energy at the end of any round, gain +2 energy next round.

cards.name: Fire Flower of the Inferno
cards.rulesText: When an opponent attacks in this realm, sacrifice this. If you do, destroy target attacking enemy.

cards.name: Life Engine Heart
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 3 faith.
Sacrifice Free
Gain 6 faith.
cards.flavorText: Will you allow your heart to be replaced or consumed?

cards.name: Ethereal Warden
cards.rulesText: Opponents can't seize stones in this realm unless they pay you 2 energy.
cards.flavorText: It devours anything, finding thoughts, memories, and dreams especially delicious.

cards.name: Pinkra Lumen
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
Hoard 2: Gain +1 energy. (You have hoard 2 if you control 2 or more stones.)
cards.flavorText: "It's only a gem, but oh! What a gem."

cards.name: Petraian Home Cooked Meal
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
Name a class. Put a +1 counter on each Wonder you control of that class and untap them.

cards.name: Caelith Leaftracker
cards.rulesText:
On Play
You may tap or untap target item or land.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.
cards.flavorText: In the forest every leaf tells a story, and she knows them all by heart.

cards.name: Percival "Galeheart" Stormwind
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Return target card with cost 3 or less in this realm to owner's hand.
cards.flavorText: "More obstacles, more glory."

cards.name: Emberwood Stalwart
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: Don't mistake height for weakness.

cards.name: Dragon's Gold
cards.rulesText: Wonders in your hand with cost 6 or more cost 2 less to play.
cards.flavorText: "I see you eyeing my gold. Are you one of the brave or one of the greedy?" - Ravagore

cards.name: Desert Survivor NBC Suit
cards.rulesText:
If equipped Wonder would be destroyed or targeted, destroy this instead. If you do, gain 1 action.
Attuned Heliosynth (If you control a Heliosynth land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Professor Tiberius Quicksilver
cards.rulesText: Whenever this becomes equipped, draw a card.
cards.flavorText: With years comes insanity, and with insanity comes installing nanites in yourself.

cards.name: Fortress Brightstone
cards.rulesText:
Hoard 3: Whenever a Dragon you control arrives here, it gets +2 this round. (You have hoard 3 if you control 3 or more stones.)
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Keeper of Drury Skulls
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Target Wonder gets +1 this round for each card you own in The Abyss.
Eternal: Return this to target realm. (Eternal triggers when this enters The Abyss from a deck.)

cards.name: Mystic Albeala
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
If any enemies arrived this round and they weren't played from a hand, their controller sacrifices them.

cards.name: Pathfinding Kli
cards.rulesText: Whenever a land you control arrives in this realm, put three +1 counters on this.
cards.flavorText: The Kli rarely shelter in one place for long, forever seeking the purest water.

cards.name: Sand Goggles
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
Untap equipped Wonder.
Attuned Heliosynth. Equipped Wonder can't have -1 counters. (If it does, remove them.)

cards.name: Noctarum the Lost
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Banish up to three target cards in The Abyss.
Sacrifice Free
Put a card from banishment into its owner's hand.

cards.name: Redstooling Hunter
cards.rulesText:
On Battle

Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Emma "Fixem" Shockbite

Whenever an equipped Wonder you control attacks, it gets +2 this round.

cards.name: Carnotitan Ravager

Move target Wonder or item in this realm to an adjacent realm. (Equipment that moves unequips first.)

cards.name: Carrionys Moth

Enemy items in this realm are nullified. (Their ability text is blank.)
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)

cards.name: Demonic Wolfsman

cards.name: Dream Reaver
cards.rulesText:

Nullify target card this round. Remove any number of counters and "this round" effects from it.

cards.name: Giant Goo'Rah Beast
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: "I've consumed your forefathers and will consume anything you propagate. Your storied lineage has no bearing to me."

cards.name: Iggling Wrotch
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: The forest holds many secrets. Some must tell their stories.

cards.name: Intricate Protective Synthetic
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 1 faith.
Spend 4 faith: This gets +8 this round. (Spend faith once per round as a free action.)

cards.name: Keeper of Beauty
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put a shield counter on target Wonder. (You may remove a shield from a card to prevent its targeting or destruction.)
Sacrifice Free
Target player shuffles all cards they own in The Abyss into their deck.

cards.name: Kraken of the Inferno
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may destroy target token.
Flying (When this attacks, you may move it to an adjacent realm after the battle.)
cards.flavorText: Fire, water, and tentacles blend in a sacred dance, paying homage to the Great Forming.

cards.name: Leviathan Scale Armor
cards.rulesText: When equipped Wonder defends, it gets +6 this round and you draw a card.
cards.flavorText: This armor is forged from the hope of a fallen kingdom.

cards.name: Luminous Medusa
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Target player loses 1 energy.
cards.flavorText: The darkest Merfolk cities are illuminated by these great columns of light.

cards.name: Lyonnisia Celestine
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put a shield counter on this. (You may remove a shield from a card to prevent its targeting or destruction.)

cards.name: Path of Light
cards.rulesText: This round, nullify all items and lands, including those that arrive later this round. (Their ability text is blank.)

cards.name: Pechanko
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Whenever an opponent's card becomes nullified here this round, draw a card.
Opponent's Wonders with tap abilities are nullified in this realm. (Their ability text is blank.)
cards.flavorText: Never bet on chance when you can bet on sabotage.

cards.name: Punish
cards.rulesText:
Banish target Wonder that battled this round.
Attuned Boundless (If you control a Boundless land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Boneskewer Spear
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +4. Sacrifice equipped Wonder at end of round.
cards.flavorText: When you grasp it, your skull will be next to adorn it.

cards.name: Reforged Summoning Platform
cards.rulesText:
On play
Return target Wonder you own from The Abyss to target realm.
If this leaves The World, sacrifice all Wonders returned by this.

cards.name: Rend
cards.rulesText: Destroy target Wonder that arrived this round.
cards.flavorText: "I'll take half now and half later." - Butcher of Magnama

cards.name: Caden Windwhisper
cards.rulesText: Whenever this arrives from anywhere other than your hand, gain an action.
cards.flavorText: Sometimes all you need to keep going is a reminder of what you're fighting for.

cards.name: Fire Grimoire
cards.rulesText: Whenever you attack with 2 or more Wonders in any realm, draw a card.
cards.flavorText: You'll know the spell is working when you hear the screams.

cards.name: Darkiron City
cards.rulesText:
Whenever a Wonder dies, you may Deny 1.
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Quiet Creek
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 2: When you play a Petraia Wonder with cost 2 or less you may put a +1 counter on it.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Dwarven Vault
cards.rulesText: Stones can't be seized from you from battles in this realm.
cards.flavorText: "This is about as safe as you can get!" - Dwarven Accountant

cards.name: Gearheart Enclave Inner
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 2: When you play an item in this realm you may put a shield counter on target Wonder in this realm.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Power of Bloodlines
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice a Wonder. If you do, create four 1-power Undead token Wonders distributed in any realms. They get the same classes as the sacrificed Wonder.

cards.name: Charging Polpo
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Sacrifice a Wonder you control in this realm.
cards.flavorText: You may feed cattle to the darkness of Umbrathene, but it will always hunger for more.

cards.name: Deep Pincer
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Create a 1-power Insect token Wonder in this realm.
Deathstrike (When this wins or ties a battle, destroy target enemy Wonder in this realm.)

cards.name: Deep Black Goop
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Discard a card.
Deathstrike (When this wins or ties a battle, destroy target enemy Wonder in this realm.)

cards.name: Quadritusk Etherphant
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: Four eyes, four legs, four tusks, forewarned.

cards.name: Sunsand Goldscale
cards.rulesText:
Whenever you play a Wonder with cost 6 or greater, gain 2 energy.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "It seems our paths were destined to cross. How fortunate for us both."

cards.name: The Crimson Marauder
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Gain control of all lands in this realm this round.
cards.flavorText: "The more you have, the more you can lose." - Izzy Stormsong

cards.name: Arcane Grasp
cards.rulesText: Gain control of target item and untap it. Sacrifice it at end of round.
cards.flavorText: People tend to think they can actually own something.

cards.name: The Power of Three
cards.rulesText: Each player draws a card. Look at each player's hand. Each player discards a card of your choice.

cards.name: Bloodeye Dragonet
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may sacrifice this. If you do, destroy target item in this realm.
cards.flavorText: To a baby dragon, everything is a chew toy.

cards.name: Vortexis Walker
cards.rulesText:
Ascend, this gets +5.
Ascend, your opponents can't attack in realm 1.
cards.flavorText: Luminals feel emotions. But not the ones known to humans.

cards.name: Shadowcast Mace
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +3 and <Badge variant="red">deathstrike</Badge>

cards.name: Steed of Verdantleaf
cards.rulesText: Wonder cards in your hand with cost 6 or more get <Badge variant="purple">attuned</Badge> for any lands.
cards.flavorText: A fast horse costs a coinpurse. A slow horse costs your life.

cards.name: Sirius Aetherblade
cards.rulesText: Opponents' items with cost 2 or less and enemies with cost 2 or less are <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>.
cards.flavorText: Starweaver Knights are known for blades that vibrate with disruption.

cards.name: Viking Phantom Caster
cards.rulesText: Whenever you play a spell, this gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: "Sval Bor Sori Vik!" He mumbles his ancient spells day and night.

cards.name: Abyssal Sand Leviathan
cards.rulesText: None
cards.flavorText: The latest in wormhole technology is... an unpleasant experience.

cards.name: Sunnia Sikala
cards.rulesText: This gets +1 for each token you control.
cards.flavorText: "Grant me safety where I may leap. Beyond the canopies bless me free."

cards.name: V-8 Wanderer
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Move target Wonder you control to target realm.
On Round Start
You may move target Wonder you control to target realm.

cards.name: Starbound Colossus
cards.rulesText: This gets +2 power for each Wonder in banishment. This can't be banished.
cards.flavorText: It draws strength from the Void's embrace.

cards.name: Reforging Titan
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Spend 5 energy. If you do, create a 5-power Titan token Wonder in target realm. Then repeat this until you have less than 5 energy.

cards.name: Staff of the Sand Seer
cards.rulesText:
On Round End
If you have 4 or more faith, draw a card. If you have 12 or more faith, create a 3-power Sentinel token Wonder here.

cards.name: Reverence Engineer
cards.rulesText:
At the end of each round, if an opponent's card didn't arrive in this realm this round, gain 2 faith.
Spend 4 faith: Target player can't attack, target cards, or play cards in target realm this round.

cards.name: Serpent's Embrace
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 2: Once per round, when you create one or more tokens, create a 1-power Plant token Wonder here.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Quantum Boots
cards.rulesText:
If you don't control a Wonder in this realm the next Wonder you play here gets attuned Boundless.
Equipped Wonder gets +2

cards.name: Treasure Map
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Sacrifice this and a Wonder. Seize a stone in a realm with no enemies.
cards.flavorText: Good judgment is key for those who seek treasures.

cards.name: Blasting Duel
cards.rulesText: Destroy target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Many gathered to watch a duel but witnessed annihilation instead.

cards.name: Resonance Reach
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Put a shield counter on target Wonder.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Warfang Fortress
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
All Wonders in this realm get deathstrike this round. (This includes enemies.)
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Rockskin Shredder
cards.rulesText: Whenever a player harvests a land, put two +1 counters on this.
cards.flavorText: Hard spiny exterior, hard spiny interior.

cards.name: Short-Range Forcefield Deployer
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
For the rest of this round, whenever a Wonder arrives under your control, it arrives with a shield counter.

cards.name: Whisperleaf Cloak
cards.rulesText:
Opponents can't tap, control, or put counters on equipped Wonder.
Equipped Wonder gets +1.
cards.flavorText: Many secrets are hidden in plain sight.

cards.name: Ward of Serendipity
cards.rulesText: Whenever an opponent plays a spell, once per round, you may discard a card. If you do, that spell is <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>.

cards.name: Temporal Harmony Clock
cards.rulesText: In case of a draw at the end of the game, the controller of realm 4 wins the game.
cards.flavorText: How much time does right now take?

cards.name: Verdant Cliffwing
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Whenever this attacks unopposed, draw a card.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Where mercy is shown, a fool's death follows.

cards.name: Triton Behemoth
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Draw a card.
cards.flavorText: "Who would've thought he'd come back so big?" - Zylon Egerton

cards.name: Onglepod
cards.rulesText: Opponents' spells cost 3 more to play.
cards.flavorText: "What does it do? Something about cybernetic disruption. It also dances from time to time."

cards.name: Richard Grumpin
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
You may tap this. If you do, whenever target opponent gains one or more actions from card abilities this round, you gain that many actions.

cards.name: Baron, the Unstable
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Target player sacrifices an item in this realm.
Tap Free
Deny 2 (Put 2 cards from the top of your deck into The Abyss.)

cards.name: Stealthy Spriggan
cards.rulesText: Whenever another Wonder arrives in this realm, its owner sacrifices a Wonder.
cards.flavorText: "Come smell this flower I found!"

cards.name: Tyros Ironfist
cards.rulesText: Each other Wonder you control in this realm gets +2 for each equipment equipped to this.
cards.flavorText: Forged by the dunes, tempered by combat.

cards.name: Vision of Thalwind
cards.rulesText: Return target card with cost 4 or less to its owner's hand.
cards.flavorText: "They called my plan madness, my visions heresy." - The Ever Herald

cards.name: Bloodfur Hunter
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Hoard 2: This gets +2 this round. (You have hoard 2 if you control 2 or more stones.)
cards.flavorText: Why is it that every damn creature on this planet is on fire?! - ZipZip NugNug

cards.name: Seraphina "The Serpent" Blackthorn
cards.rulesText:
Deathstrike
Token Wonders you control get deathstrike.
cards.flavorText: "Apply this tincture. They won't suspect a thing."

cards.name: Scouting Barnale
cards.rulesText: Whenever this would gain any +1 counters, it instead gains that amount plus an additional two +1 counters.

cards.name: Astral Vanguard Armor
cards.rulesText: When an opponent attacks in any realm, put two +1 counters on equipped Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Used by ancient Orbitalwalkers to harness the raw Formless Energy which surrounds it.

cards.name: Selva Tropicwing
cards.rulesText:
When you play this from a seek effect, you may copy that seek effect.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Curiosity takes you farther than wings ever will.

cards.name: Tharn Sharkblade
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Portal another target Wonder in this realm to realm 1.
cards.flavorText: "Whenever Tharn smiles everyone seems to leave the room." - Crimelord Ronåan Triakis

cards.name: Rylan Windstrider
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Seek 3 a Wonder with cost 2 or less. When it arrives, you may portal it to an adjacent realm.
Attuned Thalwind

cards.name: Rootling Terror
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put up to three -1 counters on target Wonder.
Symbiosis
cards.flavorText: The rule of survival is to find a snack before you become one.

cards.name: Slade Darkfur
cards.rulesText:
On Battle
The first time this battles each round, Deny 1. If the denied card is a Wonder, give target Wonder -X this round where X is the denied Wonder's power.
Attuned Petraia

cards.name: Ashenleaf
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put a shield counter on target land. (You may remove a shield from a card to prevent its targeting or destruction.)
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Bombi
cards.rulesText:
On Play
You may untap target Wonder in this realm.
cards.flavorText: Its small roar echoes the resolve of its ancestors.

cards.name: Sylira Shadowstalker
cards.rulesText: Whenever you seize a stone, this gets +5 this round. Then destroy target Wonder with power less than or equal to the number of stones you control.

cards.name: Unconfined Dusthowler
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain a free attack.
This gets +2 for each stone you control.
cards.flavorText: "Gods forbid we ever let the Dusthowler out of its cage."

cards.name: Xyrendra of Dimensional Forces
cards.rulesText: Opponents can't gain energy from stones.
cards.flavorText: Nothing escapes the pull of her vortex.

cards.name: Chieftain Kli
cards.rulesText: Whenever you activate the <Badge variant="blue">On Harvest</Badge> ability of a land, you may activate it an additional time.

cards.name: Versi Holoheart
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Gain 2 faith.
Tap Action
Spend X faith: Create X 2-power Hologram token Wonders distributed among any odd-numbered realms.

cards.name: Captain Rostar Corewind
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Return another target card in this realm to its owner's hand.
cards.flavorText: "They say love conquers all. Or in my case, love of coin."

cards.name: Gleaming Power Cell
cards.rulesText:
On Round End
For each energy you lose, put a spin counter on this, up to a maximum of 4.
On Round Start
Remove all spin counters from this and gain that much energy.

cards.name: Gyrois Cygnus
cards.rulesText:
Each round, enemies can't attack more than once in each realm.
Ascend, this gets +4.
cards.flavorText: "He did not hold the line. He was the line." - Arcadim Vol. III

cards.name: Blackhole Blunderbuss
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets +9.
Attuned Heliosynth (If you control a Heliosynth land, don't spend an action when you play this from your hand.)

cards.name: Galactic Sovereign Throne
cards.rulesText:
While this is untapped, enemies with on arrival abilities are nullified.
Tap Free
While this is tapped, enemies with tap abilities are nullified.

cards.name: Goladh the Sage
cards.rulesText:
On Play
If any number of target Wonders have counters, you may put one additional counter of the same type on each.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 Action

cards.name: Councilor Catar'r
cards.rulesText: Whenever you play a land you may tap target item or Wonder.
cards.flavorText: "Every territory is a canvas for his ambitious plans." - Annals of Corista, Vol 24.

cards.name: Kanevil Wayfarer
cards.rulesText:
If this is equipped, if it would attack, you may instead move it to an adjacent realm. Then the attack happens in the new realm. (On attack triggers happen in the new realm.)
Flying

cards.name: Borin Stormhand
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Draw a card for each stone you control.
cards.flavorText: The ground quaked and the sky shattered as if the world itself could tell Borin was angry.

cards.name: Briarmaw
cards.rulesText: Whenever a player harvests a land, that player sacrifices it.
cards.flavorText: A monstrous hunger that consumes all, leaving only fertile soil in its wake.

cards.name: By'ylar Pyreforge
cards.rulesText:
On Round End
If you control three or more Wonders that share a class, you may put two +1 counters on one of those target Wonders.

cards.name: Floral Diadem of the Verdant Queen
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder and all Wonders you control that share a class with it get +2.
cards.flavorText: Crowned in petals, steeped in war.

cards.name: Giant Hydrojelly
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Target player loses 1 action.
cards.flavorText: It consumes the adventurous, leaving the sea's secrets unclaimed.

cards.name: Hester Dust
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
You may put target Wonder you own with cost 3 or less from The Abyss into this realm or an adjacent realm.

cards.name: Mountain Ridge Mammoth
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Attuned</Badge> Petraia
cards.flavorText: You might not notice the mammoth... until your house is in a brand new valley.

cards.name: Feline Entity of Dreams
cards.rulesText: Whenever an opponent's spell or effect would target a Wonder you control, nullify it unless they spend 2 energy.

cards.name: Experiment X7v1-3
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Gain faith equal to number of Bio-Synths you control.
This gets +1 for each faith you have.

cards.name: Twilight Marsh
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Kingdom 3: Gain +1 action if a Wonder died this round. Eternal: Return this to target realm.
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Divine Conduit
cards.rulesText:
Copy the last spell you played this round if it's in The Abyss. Banish this and that spell.
Attuned Boundless

cards.name: Man-Portable Cannon
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +2. You may move this item to an adjacent realm at the end of each round. While this is equipped, all Wonders cost +2 energy to play in this realm.

cards.name: Enzo Barboni
cards.rulesText: Whenever you play an item, <Badge variant="red">stun</Badge> target enemy Wonder in the same realm as a bio-synth you control.

cards.name: Galen Mosspaw
cards.rulesText:
Enemy lands in this realm can't be harvested.
Attuned Petraia

cards.name: A-90 Plasma Detonator
cards.rulesText:
When equipped Wonder attacks, at end of turn sacrifice this equipment and destroy all Non Bio-Synth Wonders in this realm.
Attuned Heliosynth

cards.name: Brimstone Crypt
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Kingdom 2: You may put a protector counter on target Wonder in this realm.
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Commune With Technology
cards.rulesText: The next time you attack with an equipped Wonder this round, choose one: destroy target defending enemy, or double your current energy.

cards.name: Indra's Citadel
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Kingdom 3: If this is in an even-numbered realm, gain an additional action.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Tremendous Automatic Sentinel
cards.rulesText: Whenever an opponent attacks in this realm or an adjacent realm, put twenty -1 counters on target enemy Wonder in that realm at end of battle.
cards.flavorText: "Heavy weapons authorized. You now have 15 seconds to comply."

cards.name: Glasswing Cockatrice
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
You may play core cards of any Orbital this round.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "Take heed. Its spectrum of colors is the last thing you'll see." - Explorer's Journal

cards.name: Crystalsilk Spider
cards.rulesText: Whenever an <Badge variant="blue">on arrival</Badge> effect triggers, if this is untapped you may tap this. If you do, nullify that <Badge variant="blue">on arrival</Badge> effect.

cards.name: Blackthorne Banshee
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
If you own 3 or more Wonders in The Abyss, draw a card.
cards.flavorText: Death has many servants, and the banshees of Blackthorne are the loudest.

cards.name: Cairnvox Soulforger
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put target Wonder you own with cost 4 or less from The Abyss into this realm.
cards.flavorText: He masterfully wields the necromantic arts with a sinister elegance.

cards.name: Cura, Voice of Terror
cards.rulesText: Your other Undead Wonders get +2.
cards.flavorText: "I screamed until my lungs burst, until my faith was broken, until light was lost. I scream more in death."

cards.name: Xara Stratos
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
You may move target equipment you control to target Wonder you control.

cards.name: Cooking Pot of the Eternal Fire
cards.rulesText:
Whenever you win a battle, add a meat counter to this.
Tap Free
If this has any meat, gain two free attacks. If this has 20+ meat, gain control of all target player's Wonders this round and untap them.

cards.name: Deathsworn Gravesman
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Eternal</Badge>: You may return this to target realm. If you do, sacrifice it at end of round.

cards.name: Dark Healer
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Move all -1 counters from target Wonder to another target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: "Come, sit, and drink. I will make all your pain go away."

cards.name: King Hei'an
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Enemies in this realm get base power 0 this round.
cards.flavorText: In a burning world, those who fan the flames are kings.

cards.name: Corvus Shadowwing
cards.rulesText:
Whenever a Wonder you control flies, you may move it an additional time to an adjacent space.
Flying

cards.name: Time Hop
cards.rulesText: If an opponent gained control of any of your stones this round, target player gains control of one of those stones.
cards.flavorText: Emit erom eno taht yrt dluolhs ew spaherp?

cards.name: Divine Breach
cards.rulesText:
Banish target Wonder, item, or land. This can't be nullified.
On Round 7 this costs 3 less.
cards.flavorText: The cosmos finds no need for you.

cards.name: Empress Aurelia
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Portal another target Wonder to this realm.
cards.flavorText: She pulls currents as a spider pulls strands.

cards.name: Iron Citadel
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 5: If you control a Wonder with flying in this realm, defending enemy Wonders without flying don't add their power to battles in this realm.
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Ella, Procurer of Meatsacks
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may distribute three -1 counters on any number of target enemy Wonders in this realm. This gets a +1 counter for each Wonder affected this way.

cards.name: Corrupted Prismatian Behemoth
cards.rulesText: This counts as a stone unless it's the end of the game. (It doesn't count toward winning the game. It can't be seized.)

cards.name: Whiskey Raider
cards.rulesText:
Wonders you control get +1 for each stone you control.
On Round Start
Spend 1 energy for each stone you control or target opponent gains control of this.

cards.name: Gulpin Hawl
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Put +1 counters equal to this card's power on X target Wonders, where X is the number of stones you control.

cards.name: Lord Archiel Zetuma
cards.rulesText:
Your other Angels get +2.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "They came to us, their silhouettes a silent promise of celestial fire after the long night." - Citizen of Bosin VII

cards.name: Smooki
cards.rulesText: Whenever a token you control attacks, it gets +2 this round.
cards.flavorText: "Areega bleega neepa!"

cards.name: Nurse Desdemona Viridian
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Untap all Bio-Synths.
Whenever a Bio-Synth becomes tapped, put a -1 counter on each non-Bio-Synth Wonder.

cards.name: Hush of the Void
cards.rulesText: Draw a card. The next time target player plays a card this round, nullify it.
cards.flavorText: Silence precedes storms.

cards.name: Strange Mutated Mass
cards.rulesText: This gets +X power, where X is equal to the total power of Wonders you control in adjacent realms.

cards.name: Entangle
cards.rulesText: Each player loses all but one of their remaining actions this round.
cards.flavorText: Today we're going to practice deep breathing.

cards.name: Mechalion
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Tap all Wonders and lands.
cards.flavorText: "It bit my hand off. Small price to win the war." - Xerathis, Creation Architect

cards.name: Myra Voriae
cards.rulesText:
At the beginning of each odd-numbered round, you may return a spell you own with cost 3 or less from The Abyss to your hand.
Ascend, this gets +4.

cards.name: Pollenspewer
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Create X 1-power Swarm tokens with flying in this realm, where X is equal to the number of stones in unlocked realms.

cards.name: The Awakening
cards.rulesText: Return up to two lands you own from The Abyss to target realm.
cards.flavorText: Lands, long silent, bloom with the promise of new beginnings.

cards.name: Kishral Vivasynth, ChronoTitan
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
Choose one: Put two +1 counters on this or create a 1-power Construct token Wonder in target realm.

cards.name: Eye of Petraia
cards.rulesText:
This gets +1 for each land in all realms.
Your lands can't be targeted by opponents.

cards.name: Enlightenment
cards.rulesText: For the rest of the game, players gain +2 actions at the beginning of each round.
cards.flavorText: Let every step bring you closer to your potential.

cards.name: Lumina Scarab
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Put a null counter on target land.

cards.name: Deathmarcher Knight
cards.rulesText:
On Battle
Put a null counter on each enemy in this realm. Remove any number of counters and "this round" effects from them.

cards.name: End a Bloodline
cards.rulesText: Choose a class. Destroy all Wonders of that class.
cards.flavorText: All of them. Every last one.

cards.name: Skyrake Gearhawk
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Create a Sky Sword equipment item token in an adjacent realm with "Equipped Wonder gets +3. The first time equipped Wonder attacks in this realm, portal another target Wonder in this realm to realm 1."

cards.name: The Lamp of Luferia
cards.rulesText: All Wonders in this realm are <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>. (Their ability text is blank.)
cards.flavorText: "A glimpse of the world before perfection." - Zeltona, The Voice of The First

cards.name: Tendrils of Light and Shadow
cards.rulesText: Choose item or land. Destroy all cards of that type.
cards.flavorText: The brightest Solferan fires cast the longest shadows.

cards.name: Omnis Quantum
cards.rulesText:
Ascend, pick odd or even. Opponents can't play cards with that base cost this round.
Ascend, this gets +4.

cards.name: Dragon Eggs
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
You may tap a Dragon you control and sacrifice this. If you do, create a 6 power Ravagore token with flying in this realm.

cards.name: Staff of the Eldritch Tribesmen
cards.rulesText:
Whenever equipped Wonder dies, return it from The Abyss to target realm at end of round.
Equipped Wonder gets +2.
cards.flavorText: A forest of bones grows around it.

cards.name: Duatian Frontier
cards.rulesText:

Kingdom 2: Target opponent's cards each cost +1 energy if played to this realm this round.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Frostfire Citadel
cards.rulesText:

Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Pastel Bloom Drake
cards.rulesText:
If this would be banished, put it into target realm instead.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Its form in this world is a reflection of its ethereal beauty in other worlds.

cards.name: Elven Warhammer
cards.rulesText: Double equipped Wonder's power. When this equips for the first time each round, create a 2-power Elemental token Wonder in this realm.

cards.name: Rhinagi Vogal
cards.rulesText:
Token Wonders you control get +2 power.
Tap Free
Create two 1-power Beast token Wonders in target realm.

cards.name: EthosRelic FR-38
cards.rulesText: Whenever a card becomes <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>, draw a card and target player loses 1 energy.
cards.flavorText: "The. Shadow. Of. The. Past. Is. Long."

cards.name: God's Eye Release
cards.rulesText: Banish all primary Wonders and legendary Wonders.
cards.flavorText: All things return to The First.

cards.name: Horned Skull of the Minotaur
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Name a class.
While this is tapped, Wonders you control of the named class get +2.

cards.name: Nexar Voidchild
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
All enemy Wonders in this realm are nullified this round.
On Arrival
Gain 1 energy for each nullified Wonder in all realms.

cards.name: Flying Suzzer
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put X -1 counters on target Wonder, where X is the number of cards you own in The Abyss.
Flying

cards.name: Gorrash, The Dreadful
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
If this arrived from your hand or from The Abyss, choose one: Destroy target Wonder, or return target non-Bard Wonder you own in The Abyss to target realm.

cards.name: Thara Dester
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put 2 protector counters on this.
cards.flavorText: "Take solace from your trouble. I will protect you."

cards.name: The Skywraith
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Gain control of target card in this realm. Untap it.
cards.flavorText: Today you have the choice to join a pirate crew! Actually, you don't.

cards.name: Dark Magic Hydra
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Deny 5. If you played this from your hand, destroy all other Wonders with power less than the number of Wonders denied this way.

cards.name: Dimensional Piercer
cards.rulesText: When equipped Wonder attacks, shuffle target enemy Wonder in this realm into its owner's deck.
cards.flavorText: Memories are precious. Enjoy becoming one.

cards.name: Harmonic Canyon Refuge
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 4: Whenever an enemy attacks in this realm it gets -2 this round for each item you control in this realm.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Swamp Sovereign
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Symbiosis</Badge> effects can target this as if it had any power. If any <Badge variant="purple">symbiosis</Badge> ability is copying this, this gets +8.

cards.name: Grailhart, Forgotten Death Marshal
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="purple">Eternal</Badge>: You may banish a random card in target player's hand.

cards.name: Grothar Headchoppa
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Choose a number. Other Wonders with that cost get -3 this round.

cards.name: Summon Crushing Rock
cards.rulesText: Destroy all Wonders in target realm. As part of the cost, you may sacrifice an untapped land. If you do, this costs 3 less.

cards.name: Stellar Harmony Tea Set
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
You and target opponent switch control of all stones. At end of round, switch control of those stones again.

cards.name: Terring Faia
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put up to two +1 counters on target Wonder. Then put up to two -1 counters on another target Wonder.
Symbiosis

cards.name: Ethereal Grove
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Symbiosis with land. (This copies the abilities of target land.)
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Teller, Vamparus Chief
cards.rulesText: Each other Vampire you control gets +1. Each enemy Wonder in this realm gets -1.
cards.flavorText: "Attention guests! The feast is about to begin!"

cards.name: Frostsavage, the Blizzard's Wrath
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
You may stun target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: It's not the frost that bites hardest.

cards.name: Stormforged Siege Beast
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +4. When equipped Wonder attacks, <Badge variant="red">stun</Badge> target enemy in this realm.

cards.name: Fungolith Colossus
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Put up to four -1 counters on target Wonder.
On Battle
Banish target card in The Abyss. If you do, gain 4 energy.

cards.name: Sigrid Ironshield
cards.rulesText:
Whenever you attack in any other realm, you may spend 1 energy to create a 1-power Viking token Wonder in that realm.
Sigrid gets +1 for each stone you control.

cards.name: Orionis Skydreamer
cards.rulesText:
This gets cost and base power equal to the current round.
Tap Free
If this Wonder's power is higher than the power of target enemy in this realm, gain control of target stone here.

cards.name: Witch Warden
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
If you own 13 or more cards in The Abyss you may return target legendary Wonder you own from The Abyss to this realm.
Umbrathene Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Purpuria the Mystic Flame
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Banish the lowest-numbered realm.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Matter no longer matters.

cards.name: Rigel "Lightbringer" Leonis
cards.rulesText:
You may activate your ascend abilities on rounds 6 and 7.
Ascend, this gets +4.
cards.flavorText: Now and then are irrelevant to those who walk the Luminal path.

cards.name: Skraal, Ruler of the Three Lakes
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Choose an on arrival ability of another Wonder you control. Trigger it 3 times.
cards.flavorText: Past, present, and future reflected all at once.

cards.name: Utterly Complex Compound Bow
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets "On Battle draw 2 cards, gain 1 energy, and put two -1 counters on target enemy." Attuned Heliosynth.
On arrival
Put a shield counter on this.

cards.name: Phoenix Quill
cards.rulesText:
Sacrifice Free
Sacrifice Free: You may play core cards from any orbital this round. Gain 3 energy. You may bury all the cards in your hand and draw that many cards.
cards.flavorText: Kings and queens write their own stories. And so shall you.

cards.name: Plant Terror of Ethereal Grove
cards.rulesText:
Symbiosis
This card's symbiosis can copy the abilities of any two target Wonders.
cards.flavorText: All the genetics of the forest's greatest predators combined.

cards.name: Old Man "Rocket" Ricker
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Name a card. Reveal target player's deck. Banish all revealed copies of the named card. That player shuffles.

cards.name: The Prisoner
cards.rulesText: If The Prisoner is free, it gets <Badge variant="purple">Eternal</Badge>: Look at target player's hand. You control all their choices on their next turn. (Check the rules to see if The Prisoner is free.)

cards.name: Aetherium Arc Launcher
cards.rulesText:
When equipped Wonder attacks, enemy Wonders in target adjacent realm get -3 this round.
Attuned Heliosynth

cards.name: Verdantia of Petraia
cards.rulesText: Whenever you <Badge variant="orange">harvest</Badge>, you may put a +1 counter on each Petraia Wonder you control.
cards.flavorText: "As legends rise, so too does the strength of those who honor the land."

cards.name: Cindermaw the Scalder
cards.rulesText:
Whenever a stone is seized from you, you may put this from your hand into that realm for no cost if you have Solfera Link. If you do, sacrifice it at end of round.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "Enough!"

cards.name: Rage of the Ancients
cards.rulesText: Name a class. Double the power of Wonders you control of that class this round. Gain 2 free attacks.

cards.name: Ragnar Bloodbane
cards.rulesText:
Whenever you seize a stone in battle, move it to this realm.
On Round Start
Gain a free attack.

cards.name: Ayu Goss
cards.rulesText:
On Round End
If you took the last turn of the round you may untap target land or Wonder.

cards.name: Boneharvest Harp
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets "Tap Free Spend 1 energy to create a 1-power Undead token Wonder in target realm."
Whenever an Undead you own enters The Abyss from anywhere, you may untap equipped Wonder.

cards.name: Nocturna of Umbrathene
cards.rulesText: Whenever you deny a Wonder, you may put a <Badge variant="purple">null</Badge> counter on target card.
cards.flavorText: Death cannot be beaten, only delayed.

cards.name: Blauzophel
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Banish this. Target player loses all energy and actions.
cards.flavorText: It awakens with a great hunger and a greater anger.

cards.name: Azure Sky Cetacean
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Create a 5-power Aooou'la token Wonder with flying in this realm.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Where it passes, legends are born.

cards.name: Blinsworth Goldscale
cards.rulesText:
Hoard 5: This gets +3 and you draw an additional card at the start of each round.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "Keep pushing, Stoneseeker! Riches await!"

cards.name: Nexus Phasebringer
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
You may banish target item. Then in target realm create a token copy of an item in banishment.
Ascend, this gets +4.

cards.name: Mirage Terrain
cards.rulesText: Target land becomes a copy of target Wonder.
cards.flavorText: Every wilderness appears barren if you travel with a closed mind.

cards.name: Cloudweaver Construct
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
You may move this to target realm with no enemies.
cards.flavorText: "I see a rabbit. I see a tree. I see a monster!"  - Unsuspecting children

cards.name: Courageous Heart Emblem
cards.rulesText: <Badge variant="blue">On Round 7</Badge>, this gets <Badge variant="purple">attuned</Badge> Thalwind. If there are no enemies in this realm at the end of round 7, gain control of target stone here.

cards.name: Blazeholme Volcano
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 4: Whenever any Wonder dies in this realm, you may banish this. If you do, destroy all Wonders in this realm.
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: The Mind
cards.rulesText: When you activate any Wonder's tap ability, you may copy its effect.
cards.flavorText: "The mind is yet another machine to improve." - Heliosynth Proverb

cards.name: Nova Matrixbender
cards.rulesText: This gets all the abilities of non-equipment items you control.
cards.flavorText: "I am not bound by the laws of your reality."

cards.name: Open the Cosmos
cards.rulesText: Choose up to 3 target spells you own from The Abyss and play them for free. Then banish them and banish this.
cards.flavorText: Fractals of possibility spin endlessly into future.

cards.name: Prime Leophant
cards.rulesText:
Stones can't be seized from you from battles in this realm.
On Arrival
Put a shield counter on this.
cards.flavorText: Only six have ever been seen, and three of them haven't moved in a generation.

cards.name: Princess Aurora Waveheart
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Portal up to 4 other target Wonders to any realms.
cards.flavorText: As powerful as a hurricane, but less predictable.

cards.name: Azure Vault
cards.rulesText: Your lands and items not named Azure Vault can't be tapped, targeted, destroyed, <Badge variant="purple">nullified</Badge>, or controlled by opponents or opponent's cards.

cards.name: Romalax Starwielder
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Create a 2-power Knight token Wonder in this realm.
Knights you control get +2 and get "When this dies, banish target enemy in this realm."

cards.name: Raul Lightman
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Choose shadow or light. If shadow, Umbrathene Wonders get +2 and others get -1. If light, Umbrathene Wonders get -2 and others get +1.
On Round Start
You may choose shadow or light again.

cards.name: The Great Usurper
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Destroy target enemy in this realm.
cards.flavorText: The most feared is not the strongest, but the one that brings the most wretched end of life.

cards.name: Tempest Bomb
cards.rulesText: When equipped Wonder attacks, destroy this and all your Wonders. <Badge variant="purple">Seek 3</Badge> a Wonder and put a token copy of that Wonder into each realm.

cards.name: The Great Core of Alderok
cards.rulesText: At the beginning of each round, each player draws an extra card and gains double their energy.
cards.flavorText: The Great Cores once powered ancient engines of lost civilizations.

cards.name: The Mount of Helios
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Kingdom 4: Gain faith equal to the power of your Wonders in this realm.
Heliosynth Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Titanscale Aegis
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +10 and can't be targeted by cards or effects controlled by opponents.
cards.flavorText: No one knew of Darkiron. Then came the Great Uniter in full armor.

cards.name: Pyraethos of Solfera
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Put 3 protector counters distributed among up to 3 target Wonders.
cards.flavorText: Greed did not come from mortals. It was adopted in reverence from He Who Battles.

cards.name: Rus Trooper
cards.rulesText: Whenever an opponent gains an action that's not from the start of the round, you may put a +1 counter on each Wonder you control.

cards.name: Sandura of Heliosynth
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
This round, whenever a non-Heliosynth Wonder attacks, it gets -10 until end of round.

cards.name: ZipZip NugNug
cards.rulesText:
On Play
The next time an opponent plays a Wonder from their hand of cost X or less, it arrives under your control.

cards.name: Archimedes Falco
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Put them back in any order or bury them.
Flying
cards.flavorText: "If Aerius does not guide us, I will."

cards.name: The Blazing Phoenix Pub
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Wonders you control become legendary this round. Then each player may untap a nonland legendary Wonder they control.
Solfera Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Commanding Croak, the Leader
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Seek 5 a land.
cards.flavorText: "I'll always be loyal to whoever pays me the most."

cards.name: The Great Veridan
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Seek 1 a Petraia Wonder. Repeat this in each other realm where you control a land.
cards.flavorText: "Heed my call, Petraians, and bring your might."

cards.name: Ronaan Triakis
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Seek 2 a Thalwind card.
cards.flavorText: "I wonder, is it still extortion if you eat the person afterwards?"

cards.name: Adorable Vermin
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Put a -1 counter on all non-mouse Wonders.
cards.flavorText: "It followed me home. Can I keep it?" - Plague Victim

cards.name: Raziya Balakai
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Target Wonder gets +5 this round. Another target Wonder gets -5 this round.
Attuned Petraia

cards.name: Cometfall Hammer
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets +2.
When equipped Wonder attacks, double its power this round.
cards.flavorText: Bones are not meant to take the impact of a falling star.

cards.name: Murkmire Incarnate
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Tap all lands.
Sacrifice Action
Destroy all tapped lands.
cards.flavorText: Whether one holds a sword or a scythe, a harvest requires fertile ground.

cards.name: High Inquisitor Epsilon Tolaris
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Put a null counter on target Wonder.
Spend 3 faith: Discard a card. If you do, untap this.

cards.name: Elysia Highwing
cards.rulesText:
On Play
You may banish all tokens or all counters in target realm.
Flying

cards.name: Captain Isabella "Izzy" Stormsong
cards.rulesText:
On Attack
Defending player chooses flee or surrender. If flee is chosen, this gets +7 this round. If surrender is chosen, Seek 1 a card.

cards.name: Aetherion of Boundless
cards.rulesText:
Your cards can't be nullified. This can't be nullified.
Ascend, nullify all cards in target realm.

cards.name: Highlord Voluris Crestwing
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Banish the top card of your deck. Gain X actions, where X is the cost of that card.
Flying

cards.name: John Breakbang
cards.rulesText: Your legendary Wonders get +4. Whenever John is revealed from the top of your deck, you may put him into any open realm.
cards.flavorText: Loyalty and devotion lead to bravery.

cards.name: Autumn, Essence Animated
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Banish this. Shuffle all Wonders you own in The Abyss. Distribute them as evenly as possible in all realms, face down, then flip them face up. Each opponent does the same.

cards.name: Cursed Passages of Haem
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Banish this and choose one: Sacrifice one Wonder and draw a card; Sacrifice two Wonders and Seek 1 a card; Sacrifice three Wonders and return target Wonder you own from The Abyss to target realm.

cards.name: Diákonos
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: He explored Aetherstorms and wrestled with the choice of unity or igniting a war across orbitals.

cards.name: Jarthex Pyrethane, Lord of Darkiron
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: "From molten depths, I forge both weapons and destiny."

cards.name: Astrox A-9
cards.rulesText: Double the + power bonuses generated by all equipment you control.
cards.flavorText: "At last, a suitable target for my model 17-G mass driver."

cards.name: King Aldern Leafsong
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
You may put a +1 counter on any number of target elves.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.
cards.flavorText: "Where the sunlight sings, dances the Leafsong king." - Elvish Folksong

cards.name: Blossom's Bite
cards.rulesText: Equipped Wonder gets +3. Once per round, when a Wonder equipped with this attacks, you may untap that Wonder.
cards.flavorText: With every strike, a bouquet of beauty and death.

cards.name: Baern Bal'Thor
cards.rulesText: This gets +1 for each card you own in The Abyss.
cards.flavorText: "Excellent! Keep throwing yourselves from the castle walls!"

cards.name: Epthus, the Lost Sword
cards.rulesText:
Equipped Wonder gets +4 and deathstrike.
Whenever a Wonder dies in battle in this realm its owner loses 2 energy.

cards.name: The First
cards.rulesText:
This gets all Orbital Links. (Your cards of any orbitals cost -1 energy and you may play any core cards.)
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Jän, the Magician
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Choose target player. Move all +1 counters from their Wonders onto this. Move all -1 counters from your Wonders onto target enemy in this realm.
Tap Free
Deny 3

cards.name: Eternitum the Space Lich
cards.rulesText: Whenever a card arrives from anywhere other than from a hand, you may banish it. If you do, put two +1 counters on this. (Tokens count as cards.)

cards.name: Carbon-X7 Synthforge
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Choose target item and create a token copy of it in target realm.
cards.flavorText: We know not the limits of what the elder Synthforge can make.

cards.name: Divine Bloodbearer
cards.rulesText:
On Play
Discard your hand.
cards.flavorText: "Hehheehhaahahaa."

cards.name: Eye of the Maelstrom
cards.rulesText: Each player plays with the top card of their deck revealed. You may play cards from the top of your deck as if they were in your hand.
cards.flavorText: Enjoy life's symbol pleasures.

cards.name: Helia Hexbane
cards.rulesText:
Whenever you spend faith, put a +1 counter on this for each faith spent.
Spend X faith: Seek 2 a Wonder or item with cost X or less.

cards.name: Jorambe
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Destroy target stone. If this leaves play, banish this.

cards.name: Market of Lost Wonders
cards.rulesText:
On Harvest
Kingdom 3: If this is an odd round, gain an extra action. If it's an even round, gain 2 energy.
Boundless Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Gem Primordial
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Banish target stone you control in this realm. If you do, this card becomes a stone. (It's still a Wonder. It can be seized.)
This gets power equal to two times the current round.

cards.name: Cedarshade Ruins
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 5: Wonders you control in this realm can't be nullified.
Petraia Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.
cards.flavorText: Sounds, smells, and the glory of life everywhere.

cards.name: Commander Bathr'Al
cards.rulesText:
On Round Start
After gaining energy at the start of the round, each player spends 2 energy for each stone they control or that stone returns to the center.
Opponents can't gain energy from stones.

cards.name: Drogothar the Destroyer
cards.rulesText:
Tap Free
Spend X energy. Put X -1 counters on each enemy in this realm.
Flying
cards.flavorText: Dormiens non excitare Draconis.

cards.name: Catalonus of the Sunforge
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: In the light of a thousand suns, darkness finds no refuge.

cards.name: Corruption Warp
cards.rulesText: Destroy all Wonders that aren't legendary.
cards.flavorText: Corruption destroys the powerful first.

cards.name: Marinus of Thalwind
cards.rulesText: Whenever you <Badge variant="purple">portal</Badge> a Wonder, <Badge variant="red">stun</Badge> target enemy.
cards.flavorText: "Every drop in the ocean reflects my will."

cards.name: Clearsky Eyrie
cards.rulesText:
Kingdom 4: Once each round, when a Wonder you control arrives in this realm, you may trigger its on arrival ability an additional time.
Thalwind Link
Harvest: Gain 1 action.

cards.name: Desolation
cards.rulesText: Each player sacrifices a Wonder or item in each realm where they control a stone.
cards.flavorText: "May you experience the grace of destruction." - Umbrathene Cleric

cards.name: Aerius of Thalwind
cards.rulesText: Whenever you use a seek effect, <Badge variant="red">stun</Badge> target enemy. (<Badge variant="red">Stun</Badge> whether or not the seek is successful.)
cards.flavorText: "Every gust of wind reflects my intention."

cards.name: Cosmic Cataclysm
cards.rulesText: Create a 4-power Angel token Wonder with <Badge variant="red">flying</Badge> in up to 3 different realms. Gain 2 free attacks.

cards.name: Agaric Supreme
cards.rulesText:
Tap Action
Put a -1 counter on each enemy Wonder. Banish all target player's cards in The Abyss.
On Battle
Enemies in this realm with power less than this Wonder's power get base power 0 this round.

cards.name: Lo Lynn
cards.rulesText: Whenever you <Badge variant="orange">harvest</Badge> 2 or more lands, gain an action.
cards.flavorText: "Underestimate me at great peril to thyself."

cards.name: The Venerated Gizmarion
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: "We honor The First with our words, our actions, and through augmentation of our being."

cards.name: Palegost the Vast
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: The ocean's wrath has a name, and it coils beneath the waves.

cards.name: Loyal Friend
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
Seek 3 a Petraia Noble Wonder.

cards.name: Slayer Keigeroth
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: "My blade knows no loyalty, only the thrill of blood."

cards.name: Three Shades of Darkness
cards.rulesText:
On Arrival
This gets +4 this round.
cards.flavorText: They will appear when the time is near, wielding the night and fate like a scythe.

cards.name: Coalition Surge
cards.rulesText: Target Wonder gets +1 this round for each Wonder you control unless target opponent spends 5 energy. If they do, you gain +2 actions next round.
